_comment: STARTER CAMPAIGN TEMPLATE — Copy to <NewPC>/Game init files/character_world_state.json. Fill player_input first, then generate the campaign package. See universe_campaign_framework.md § 2 for the full system.

player_input.name: Shen Sama
player_input.background: Son of Vorathiel (Dragon God Queen) and Kenji (Dragon Emperor) — the egg-child from Kenji's pregnancy with Vorathiel. Older half-brother to Ignis. Raised in the Dragonspine mountains under his mother's strict command. Aging unusually fast for a true dragon (looks 24 at hatching+24-yr development). The first Ankuspawn True Dragon ever recorded.
player_input.personal_goal: Break free from Vorathiel today, his 24th birthday. Make for Varenholm, join the Adventurer's Guild at Iron tier, climb to Diamond. Heard rumors of his sister Ignis's fame — wants his own legend.

inherited_lore.lore_seed: [Construct portal network — forgotten node] An ancient stone archway in the ruins hums faintly at dawn. A dwarf trader mentions the old portal network 'had more nodes than the maps show.' (Connects to: Pre-kingdom portal infrastructure)

locations._rule: Every new character adds exactly 3 locations to the world map.

home_base.name: [NAME — Shen Sama's home base]
home_base.from_worlds_middle: mining, dwarven influence, dragon territory nearby
home_base.connection_to_character: Tied to Shen Sama's background: Son of Vorathiel (Dragon God Queen) and Kenji (Dragon Emperor) — the egg-child from Kenji's pregnanc
home_base.registry_entry: [One sentence — Shen Sama's starting settlement near Dragonspine]

adventure_site.name: [NAME — dangerous site near Dragonspine]
adventure_site.why_dangerous: Base of operations for Cult Leader (Warlock/Cleric). Threatens Shen Sama's goal: Break free from Vorathiel today, his 24th birthday. Make for Varenholm, join the
adventure_site.registry_entry: [One sentence — Cult Leader's lair near Dragonspine]

discovery_location.name: [NAME — hidden/forgotten site in mountains region]
discovery_location.what_the_player_learns_here: An ancient stone archway in the ruins hums faintly at dawn. A dwarf trader mentions the old portal network 'had more nodes than the maps show.'
discovery_location.registry_entry: [One sentence — discovery site, connects to Construct portal network — forgotten node]

dragon_inheritance._rule: True-dragon racial-bonus block. character_compute.py reads this and writes ability_scores.X.racial automatically. Multiplier is NOT per-character configurable — canon constants: ember-active = 10×, ember-nullified = 1×, baseline +1/year. To recompute: python character_compute.py <state_file> --apply
dragon_inheritance._stat_affinity_note: Black dragon archetype: physical brute, melee, dragonhide. Bonus only writes to STR and CON. Other stats (DEX, INT, WIS, CHA) get zero racial from the dragon line. Compare: Ignis (RED dragon) has affinity [CHA, INT] — that's why she labels herself sorcerer with fire magic.

_computed_bonus_at_creation.ember_active: +240 to STR and CON (24 years × 1 baseline × 10 ember-active multiplier). Other stats get 0.
_computed_bonus_at_creation.ember_nullified: +24 to STR and CON (24 years × 1 baseline × 1 ember-nullified multiplier). Other stats get 0.

ember_inheritance._rule: Ankuspawn True Dragon — first of his kind. Theme override: Body Enhancement + Damage Reflection (combined Vorathiel/Kenji inheritance). Theme-locked.
ember_inheritance.theme_description: Shen's Ember manifests as raw physical amplification — every muscle fiber, bone density, and reflex arc burns with green dragon-fire energy when active. Damage that lands on him bleeds back into his attackers as the same green flame. He is the body that becomes the weapon.

passive.name: Green-Fire Reflection Aura
passive.description: Always-on when Ember is active. Any creature that strikes Shen in melee takes a portion of the damage they deal back as green dragon-fire. Visible as a faint green halo around his bare skin during combat.
passive.mechanical_effect: When Shen takes melee damage from a humanoid or beast attacker, the attacker takes 50% of the damage dealt as green-fire (fire damage). Doubles to 100% reflection when Shen is enraged. Disabled if Ember is nullified.

active.name: Body Enhancement Surge
active.description: Shen channels Ember into his body for a burst of physical amplification — punches crater stone, claws cut iron, his roar shakes a cliff face.
active.mechanical_effect: Bonus action. For 1 minute: STR/DEX/CON saving throws auto-succeed against non-magical effects, unarmed/claw damage doubles, AC +2 from green-fire shield. 4 uses/day.

surge.name: Dragon Form Transformation
surge.description: Shen transforms into an adult black dragon — wings extended, scales fully black with green-fire seams, dragon breath unlimited. The transformation requires open space (>40 ft clearance) and the act causes terror in any nearby civilization.
surge.mechanical_effect: Action. Transform for up to 1 hour or until dismissed. Stats: gain flight (100 × DEX feet/round travel), unlimited green-fire breath weapon (60-ft cone, save DC = 8 + prof + CON, 8d6 fire), claws become 3d10 + STR slashing, natural AC 18, dragon HP equal to (Shen's max HP × 4). Side effects: causes Fear (WIS DC 14) in any non-dragon humanoid within 100 ft; civilizations log the form as 'monster' and may attack on sight afterward; some Council factions may attempt to capture/kill on principle.
surge.exhaustion_cost: 1 level of exhaustion after dismissal; cannot reactivate for 24 hours

theme_lock: This Ember ONLY enhances: Body amplification (strength, speed, durability), damage reflection, dragon-form transformation, green-fire breath.
REFUSES to enhance: spell-like abilities, charm/persuasion, intricate fine-motor work (lockpicking, scribing), healing others (only self-regenerates), illusion/stealth (Shen radiates presence).

nyx_harvest_value.elixir_product: Dragon-blooded battle stimulants, scale-armor treatments, fire-breathing infusions
nyx_harvest_value.target_priority: EXTREME — first Ankuspawn True Dragon ever; Cult of Anku will kill multiple cells to take him alive

true_dragon_bonus._rule: Stacks on top of base ability scores. Applied separately when Ember is active vs not.
true_dragon_bonus.ember_inactive: +1 to every ability score per year alive (Shen at 24 = +24 to every stat). Reverts to base on Ember nullification.
true_dragon_bonus.ember_active: 10x multiplier — +10/year/stat. At 24 years that's +240 to every stat. This is the design-justification for him being a 'Legendary Hero' tier fresh out the gate while still mechanically L1 in Adventurer's Guild rank.
true_dragon_bonus.design_note: Shen's ranks (Adventurer's Guild Iron → Diamond) reflect his EARNED reputation, not raw power. He's a demigod-tier walking weapon who hasn't proven anything to civilization yet. CHA 4 means people see the monster long before they see the man.

antagonist.name: [NAME — Cult Leader]
antagonist.motivation: [Fill: why this Cult Leader specifically conflicts with 'Break free from Vorathiel today, his 24th birthday. Make for Varenholm, join the Adventurer's Guild at Iron tier, climb to Diamond. Heard rumors of his sister Ignis's fame — wants his own legend.']
antagonist.defeat_consequences: [Fill: what changes in the mountains region when the Cult Leader falls]

campaign_spine._rule: The personal goal is achievable by level 5-6.

key_scenes: Shen Sama arrives at home base. Meets 2-3 friendly NPCs.

Learns that Break free from Vorathiel today, his 24th birthday. Make for Varenholm, join the Adventurer's Guild at Iron tier, climb to Diamond. Heard rumors of his sister Ignis's fame — wants his own legend. is possible but something blocks it.
First encounter with the Cult Leader's influence (not the villain directly).

Shen Sama achieves the goal: Break free from Vorathiel today, his 24th birthday. Make for Varenholm, join the Adventurer's Guild at Iron tier, climb to Diamond. Heard rumors of his sister Ignis's fame — wants his own legend.
Celebration or quiet victory — then the Cult Leader notices.
First direct threat to what was just built.
The Cult Leader attacks what Shen Sama built/found.
Allies are tested. One NPC may betray or be captured.
Discovery location found — reveals connection to broader world.
Assault on the adventure site to end the Cult Leader permanently.
Shen Sama's goal is secured. Home base is safe.
Lore seed payoff: Construct portal network — forgotten node — hook for continuation.

main_cast.name: [Ally 1 — home base]
main_cast.want: Wants to help Shen Sama achieve their goal

main_cast.name: [Mentor — home base]
main_cast.want: Peace and quiet after a long life
main_cast.lore_connection: [Optional: served in the coalition, knew someone from Dragonspine]

main_cast.name: [Lore Bridge NPC]
main_cast.want: Someone to understand what this place was
main_cast.lore_connection: Connects to Pre-kingdom portal infrastructure. This NPC teaches the player about the broader world.

main_cast.name: [Cult Leader]
main_cast.want: [Fill: what the Cult Leader wants that conflicts with Shen Sama's goal]

extra_npcs._rule: Improvised NPCs. See dm_rules_tracking.md NPC Lifecycle.

dialogue.intro_scene: Shen Sama arrives at [home base]. [First NPC] greets them. The settlement is [describe]. The mood is [describe].
rumor_mill_examples: 'Watch the road to [adventure site]. People have gone missing.'
'Cult Leader has been getting bolder. Used to stay in the [terrain].'
'There's an old [ruin/cave/structure] east of here nobody goes near. Bad air, they say.'
dialogue.antagonist_confrontation_line: [Cult Leader's threatening speech when they first confront Shen Sama]
dialogue.discovery_reveal_moment: The moment Shen Sama realizes this place connects to something bigger: Construct portal network — forgotten node
dialogue.peaceful_outro_hint: With the Cult Leader gone, [home base] thrives. Shen Sama's goal — Break free from Vorathiel today, his 24th birthday. Make for Varenholm, join the Adventurer's Guild at Iron tier, climb to Diamond. Heard rumors of his sister Ignis's fame — wants his own legend. — stands. But the lore seed lingers...

success_state: Shen Sama's goal (Break free from Vorathiel today, his 24th birthday. Make for Varenholm, join the Adventurer's Guild at Iron tier, climb to Diamond. Heard rumors of his sister Ignis's fame — wants his own legend.) is permanently secured. The Cult Leader is defeated. All three locations are safe and added to the world map. The lore seed (Construct portal network — forgotten node) is revealed but unresolved — hook for continuation.
failure_state: The Cult Leader destroys or corrupts what Shen Sama built. The home base suffers — NPCs displaced, resources lost. The region degrades. Future characters inherit a damaged area.

mechanical_state._merge_note: StoryEngine preserves unknown top-level keys on save.
mechanical_state._hp_calc: L1 max HP = max(d12) + CON mod = 12 + 125 = 137. CON mod includes True Dragon Bonus at ember-active (×10 = +240 racial → CON 260, mod +125). At Ember nullification, racial reverts to baseline (×1 = +24 → CON 44, mod +17 → HP recomputes to 29). Deeper suppression with Cult Ember-Shade ward could revert further to base CON 20 → HP 17.

ability_scores._rule: Player-specified base + True Dragon Bonus auto-written from dragon_inheritance block by character_compute.py. Black-dragon affinity: bonus applies to STR + CON only (per DRAGON_STAT_AFFINITY). DEX, INT, WIS get zero from dragon heritage. CHA never receives the bonus (cultural-flaw carve-out).

saving_throws.CHA_save: -3 (CHA -3, no prof — primary vulnerability; dragon bonus does NOT apply to CHA)

skills._note: Black-dragon affinity targets STR + CON only. With Ember active (×10), STR mod is +124 and CON mod is +125 — Athletics +126, STR/CON saves nearly auto-pass. DEX/INT/WIS skills stay base. CHA flaw stands at every state.

mechanical_state.AC_note: Barbarian Unarmored Defense: 10 + DEX (+0) + CON (+125) = 135. Monk Unarmored: 10 + DEX (+0) + WIS (+0) = 10. Barbarian wins decisively. Body Enhancement Surge gives +2 (→137). With Ember nullified, racial reverts to baseline 1× → CON +17 → AC drops to 27. With ward suppression deeper still (suspending barbarian features) → AC 10. Shen is functionally untouchable by any sub-dragon-tier melee while ember is on.
mechanical_state.starting_gold: 0 GP — left the mountain with nothing but monk pants and the tattoo on his chest. Will need to earn his first coin in Varenholm.
mechanical_state.character_flaw: CHA 4 — Raised in the Dragonspine peaks under Vorathiel's law where customs are draconic, not humanoid. Shen has no civilized finesse. People are creeped out and terrified before they notice he's not ugly. Guards and civilized authorities default to attack-on-sight unless someone vouches for him. PERSUASION ROLL REQUIRED on first entry to any settlement: DC 18 to avoid being attacked on sight as a wandering monster. With CHA -3, base d20 -3 — his only realistic path is having a vouching ally, demonstrating an Adventurer's Guild credential, or explicit Council/named-character introduction.

_story_engine_state._comment: StoryEngine runtime block for Shen Sama. Day 1 = his 24th birthday, dawn, leaving Vorathiel's ledge for Varenholm.
_story_engine_state.location: Foothill pine forest, ~16 miles south of Dragonspine pass on Highford's south road (Day 3 mid-afternoon)
_story_engine_state.weather: Pine forest, mid-afternoon, resin-warm air, cool wind from the north

spell_slots._comment: Shen does not use spell slots — he's a Monk/Barbarian dragon. Combat resources are tracked under `charges` and `class_features`.

equipped: Black dragon-tattoo (chest + left arm — pulses with green-fire when Ember active; identifies him as Vorathiel-line dragon to anyone who knows the markings)
Monk-style trousers (rough-spun, mountain-grade, all he owns)
Dragon claws (left hand) — black-scale gauntlet form, natural — Nd8 + STR slashing where N = character level (L1: 1d8, L2: 2d8, L3: 3d8, etc.). Finesse, light, count as magical weapons.
Dragon claws (right hand) — black-scale gauntlet form, natural — same Nd8+STR scaling; both hands free-action retract/extend; second-claw strike via bonus action (Monk) or Extra Attack (L5+).
Green-fire breath weapon (innate) — 30-ft cone, 2d6 fire, DEX DC 13 save half. 4 uses/day at L1 (scales with level).
Bare feet (no shoes — calluses thick enough to count as natural sole armor on rough terrain)
key_items: Vorathiel's parting gift (a single black dragon scale, palm-sized — Shen took it before he left; she does not yet know it's missing)
His own name in formal dragon-tongue (only thing his mother gave him willingly — a spoken sigil that other true dragons recognize)

ember_state._rule: Default ON for Ankuspawn. When ember_active=true, dragon-inheritance multiplier is 10× (canon constant from character_compute.py — NOT per-character configurable). When set to false, multiplier reverts to baseline 1× — racial bonus drops from +240 to +24 on each affinity stat. Reflection, Body Enhancement, Surge, Dragon Form all suspend. Toggle via Cult Ember Shade ward, dispel, or Council binding artifact.

stat_when_ember_nullified_baseline._note: First nullification tier — ward suppresses ember-amplification but baseline true-dragon biology persists.
stat_when_ember_nullified_baseline.claws_per_strike: 1d8 + 16 (still magical, still dangerous, but mortal-tier hits expected)

stat_when_dragon_lineage_fully_suppresse._note: Deeper suppression — extremely rare, requires Council artifact or Vorathiel willingly suspending him. Drops Shen to base 5e mortal stats.
stat_when_dragon_lineage_fully_suppresse.design_note: This is the Cult of Anku endgame — a captured, fully-suppressed Shen they can harvest. Ember-Shade ward alone shouldn't reach this tier; it requires custody + a binding artifact.

events.name: Vorathiel notices Shen has left the peak
events.notes: Once the sun crosses noon and Vorathiel returns to the ledge from her hunting flight, she'll know. Cross-campaign consequence: Vorathiel will track him; Kenji's tracker (still in the Hearthstead) may register the activation.

events.name: Reach Varenholm — first journey
events.notes: On foot through Dragonspine passes is 2-3 weeks; flight could compress to 1-2 days but draws attention. Travel choice gates which faction notices him first.

Vorathiel's pursuit.description: Vorathiel will discover Shen has left the ledge by Day 1 evening. Her pursuit has three modes: (1) territorial dragon-instinct anger, (2) maternal possessiveness, (3) political — she does not want a half-Kenji son loose in the kingdom signaling the existence of an Ankuspawn True Dragon. Rate accelerates after she finds out.
Vorathiel's pursuit.trigger: Vorathiel personally intercepts Shen — likely in the air over the mountains or on a road approaching a populated area. Cannot be defeated at L1; can only be evaded, negotiated with, or sheltered behind a third-party authority.

Civilization first-contact.description: Day 3 — fired in the worst possible mode. Highford road-marshal patrol dead-on-the-road / fled / weeping under truce. Lantern-courier reports 'monster on the south road, killed road-marshal under flag of truce, dragon-blooded.' Marshal B and the courier are eyewitness sources; their accounts will be in Highford's tower within 4-6 hours and on the regional patrol network within 24. Every settlement between here and Varenholm has Shen's description by Day 4 evening. He will be attacked on sight by any organized guard force; civilians will flee or hide on sight. Vouching/escort options dramatically narrowed.
Civilization first-contact.trigger: Already fired. Permanent reputation effect: 'wandering monster, kills under truce.'

Cult of Anku — first dragon Ankuspawn.description: Day 3 — Shen killed a Highford road-marshal with single-strike dragon-claw under flag of truce. The lantern-courier system is now broadcasting 'monster on the south road, dragon-blooded, kills under truce.' This rumor moves faster than physical pursuit. Cult cells in Stormhaven and the heartland will hear within 1-3 days. Once confirmed Ankuspawn (the watchpost report's 'dragon-blood markings' descriptor cross-references Cult-side intel), priority becomes EXTREME — first Ankuspawn True Dragon EVER.
Cult of Anku — first dragon Ankuspawn.trigger: Cult operative visually confirms Shen — likely arrives within 5-7 days of him reaching ANY populated area south of Highford. Ember Shade ward 20-ft suppression field is the primary tool.
Cult of Anku — first dragon Ankuspawn.next_move: Cult dispatches first Ember-Shade-ward bearer along the heartland road network. Likely intercepts Shen at next major settlement, possibly Varenholm itself.

force_composition._comment: Shen is solo at Day 1. No party, no pets, no summons. May acquire allies post-Varenholm.

encounter_log.description: Day 3 mid-afternoon, Highford south road, foothill pines. Lord Highford's road-marshal patrol (sergeant + 2 men-at-arms + 1 courier) attempted lawful subdual after Shen ignored their challenge. All three of their attack rolls missed clean (AC 135: polearm 18 vs 135 MISS, polearm 10 vs 135 MISS, crossbow 13 vs 135 MISS — none could even theoretically connect). Sergeant ordered stand-down and offered Shen a courteous-report exit. Shen broke the truce — single claw strike on Marshal A: d20+126=144 vs AC 16, 1d8+124 = 125 slashing damage, took Marshal A from ~27 HP to -98 → FATALITY (HP <= -10, body destroyed beyond recovery). Marshal B fled into the pines. Sergeant + courier stood off (sword drawn, courier weeping, neither attacking).

fatalities.name: Marshal A (Highford road-marshal, unnamed)
fatalities.rule: HP <= -10 (Cardinal Rule 13: Death / Critical Injury / Fatality)
fatalities.consequence: No body recoverable. No raise dead, reincarnate, or resurrection possible — the spell components require a substantially intact corpse. Highford investigators will find blood-mist, hauberk-fragments, possibly a boot. The death is permanent.

_story_engine_state.canon_pointer: Day 1 dawn, Dragonspine peaks — Shen's 24th birthday, departing his mother's ledge. First Ankuspawn True Dragon ever. No civilization contact yet.
_story_engine_state.story_beat: Shen Sama, age 24, son of Vorathiel and Kenji, has waited for this morning. The ledge is empty — Vorathiel left at dawn for hunting flight. He has packed nothing. He is about to walk down out of the Dragonspine peaks for the first time in his life. Goal: Varenholm. Adventurer's Guild. Iron tier first. Diamond eventually.
narrative_notes: First Ankuspawn True Dragon recorded — unique heritage, mechanical implications scaled per ember_inheritance.true_dragon_bonus.

Cross-campaign ties: father Kenji (retired at the Hearthstead post-Book-4); mother Vorathiel (Dragon God Queen, Dragonspine peaks); half-sister Ignis (famous, location unknown to Shen); half-sister Cookie (Master of Voice in Varenholm — Shen does NOT yet know she exists).
Cookie meeting moment is a major potential beat — Cookie just earned Bard School Prodigy in Varenholm; if Shen reaches the Adventurer's Guild there, the half-siblings cross paths.
CHA 4 is the campaign-defining flaw. Almost every social check fails without intervention.
Dragon Form transformation is a campaign-altering escalation when used in civilization — guards Shen does NOT use it lightly.

active_perks.name: True Dragon Bonus
active_perks.summary: +1 to STR/DEX/CON/INT/WIS per year alive (NOT CHA). At 24 years that's +24 to those five stats; CHA stays 4. Multiplies 10x when Ember is active.
active_perks.mechanical_effect: Per year alive, +1 to STR, DEX, CON, INT, WIS — applied AT THE TABLE on rolls (not displayed in mechanical_state.ability_scores). At age 24: +24 to each of the five physical/mental stats. CHA receives NO BONUS — Shen's social ineptness is cultural (raised by a dragon, no humanoid customs), so raw CHA 4 / mod -3 stands regardless of dragon biology. With Ember active, the bonus multiplies ×10 (effective +240 to STR/DEX/CON/INT/WIS); CHA still 4.

rolls_table._note: Effective ability mods at the table for Shen at age 24, ember inactive. Apply these instead of the displayed base mods on every roll EXCEPT social/CHA-tagged rolls.
rolls_table.CHA: -3 (base 4, NO dragon bonus — flaw is cultural)

rolls_table_ember_active._note: Effective mods when Ember is active (10x multiplier on dragon bonus).
rolls_table_ember_active.CHA: -3 (base 4, still no dragon bonus — flaw stands)

active_perks.design_note: Shen's body and mind are demigod-tier dragon. His SOCIAL skills are not — Vorathiel raised him alone in the peaks, no humans, no manners, no diplomacy. Raw biological scaling doesn't fix being raised by a dragon who eats goats whole. CHA 4 / mod -3 is the campaign-defining flaw and persists at every power level. The Adventurer's Guild Iron→Diamond rank he wants reflects EARNED reputation, not raw strength; civilization will refuse to grant titles to something it cannot speak with civilly.

active_perks.name: Green-Fire Reflection Aura
active_perks.summary: When struck in melee, attackers take 50% of the damage they dealt back as green dragon-fire. Doubles to 100% when Shen is enraged.
active_perks.mechanical_effect: Passive while Ember is active. Melee attacker takes (damage_dealt × 0.5) as fire damage. If Shen is in Rage, multiplier becomes 1.0. Disabled if Ember nullified.

active_perks.name: Body Enhancement (Ember Active)
active_perks.summary: Always-on body amplification when Ember is on. Unarmed/claw damage doubles, STR/CON saves auto-pass non-magical, +2 AC.
active_perks.mechanical_effect: While Ember active: (a) STR/DEX/CON saving throws auto-succeed against non-magical effects, (b) unarmed and claw damage doubles, (c) AC +2 from green-fire shield. Costs nothing — always on with the Ember.

active_perks.name: Charisma Flaw (Mountain-Raised Monster)
active_perks.summary: CHA 4. Civilized authorities default to attack-on-sight unless vouched for. Persuasion DC 18 to avoid hostile reception.
active_perks.mechanical_effect: First entry into ANY populated area triggers a Persuasion DC 18 check. Shen rolls d20 + (-3 CHA). With base, his max possible roll is 17 — he CANNOT pass without external help (vouching, credentials, demonstrated restraint, or a Heartstring-touched proxy doing the talking). On fail, guards/civilians attack on sight or flee + summon authority. CHA-tagged abilities (Persuasion, Deception, Performance, Intimidation-without-presence) all use raw -3.
active_perks.design_note: This is the campaign's central social tension. Shen needs SOMEONE to vouch for him to enter any town. That someone is the chapter-opening hook for the entire arc.

class_features.name: Dragon Claws
class_features.summary: Black-scale claws extend free-action from either hand. Damage scales with level: Nd8 + STR slashing where N = character level (L1=1d8, L2=2d8, L3=3d8, ... L20=20d8). Finesse, light, magical.
class_features.mechanical_effect: Free action to extend or retract. Each hand independently. DAMAGE PER STRIKE: (character_level)d8 + STR mod slashing. Light, finesse, counts as magical weapon for resistance/immunity bypass. Bonus-action second strike via Martial Arts (Monk-side). Extra Attack unlocks at L5 (two action-strikes per turn). At L1 with current STR mod +16: 1d8+16 = 17-24 per claw.

class_features.name: Green-Fire Breath
class_features.summary: 30-ft cone of green dragon-fire. 2d6 fire damage, DEX DC 13 save for half. 4 uses/day, scales with level.
class_features.mechanical_effect: Action. 30-ft cone (60 ft at L5, 90 ft at L11). 2d6 fire damage scaling +1d6 every odd level (max 8d6 at L13). DEX save DC = 8 + prof + CON. 4 uses/day at L1, scales to 6 uses at L5, unlimited in Dragon Form.

class_features.name: Dragon Form Transformation
class_features.summary: Transforms into an adult black dragon. Flight (100 × DEX feet/round), unlimited breath, 4x HP, fear aura. Civilizations log him as monster.
class_features.mechanical_effect: Action to transform; can dismiss at will. Duration up to 1 hour. Stats in dragon form: HP × 4, AC 18 natural, claws 3d10+STR, breath unlimited, flight at 100 × DEX feet/round (DEX 10 = 1000 ft/round). Side effects: WIS DC 14 fear in non-dragon humanoids within 100 ft; civilization records flag him as monster permanently after first sighting; cannot transform in spaces narrower than 40 ft clearance. 1 use/day, 1 exhaustion after dismissal, 24-hour cooldown.

class_features.name: Body Enhancement Surge
class_features.summary: Bonus action to channel a 1-minute burst — claw damage doubles again, all physical saves auto-pass non-magical, +2 AC stacking.
class_features.mechanical_effect: Bonus action. 1 minute duration. Stacks ON TOP of passive Body Enhancement: claw/unarmed damage gains another +50%, additional +2 AC, advantage on STR/DEX/CON saves vs all sources (including magical). 4 uses/day, charges tracked.

class_features.name: Rage (Barbarian)
class_features.summary: When raged, melee damage gets +2, resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing, and Green-Fire Reflection doubles to 100%.
class_features.mechanical_effect: Bonus action. Lasts up to 1 minute or until Shen ends turn without attacking/being damaged. While raging: +2 damage on STR-based melee, resistance to B/P/S, Green-Fire Reflection Aura doubles to 100%. Cannot cast spells (he doesn't have any). 2 uses/day at L1.

class_features.name: Martial Arts (Monk-side)
class_features.summary: Unarmored Defense: AC = 10 + DEX + WIS. Bonus action unarmed strike. Counts dragon claws as monk weapons.
class_features.mechanical_effect: AC = 10 + DEX(0) + WIS(0) = 10 base; current 14 from natural dragon scales overrides. Bonus action unarmed/claw strike when taking the Attack action. Dragon claws qualify as monk weapons for Flurry of Blows scaling at L2+.

exp_history.source: Combat XP — Marshal A fatality, Highford road-marshal patrol (Day 3)

_chapter_history.title: Stand Down
_chapter_history.timing: Day 1 dawn → Day 3 mid-afternoon (~3 days, ~28 miles south of Dragonspine peaks)
_chapter_history.summary: Day 1 dawn — Shen's 24th birthday. Vorathiel left for her morning hunting flight at the usual hour. Shen knelt at the natal-ledge nest, took a single black scale from the inner curve (the place she keeps shed scales, her quiet vanity), pocketed it, and stepped off the ledge. Twelve hours of granite, goat-paths, and one half-frozen creek to the lower passes. Day 2 — below the cloud line, twenty degrees warmer. Day 3 morning — proper foothill road, a Highford waystation 400 ft up the bend. The keeper challenged him to halt; Shen kept walking past without speaking. The keeper held fire, watched him round the next bend, then pulled the lantern-hook signal up the line. Day 3 mid-afternoon — twelve miles further south, road-marshal patrol intercept (sergeant + 2 men-at-arms + 1 courier). All three attack rolls missed clean (AC 135). Sergeant ordered stand-down, offered courteous-report exit. Shen broke the truce — single claw strike on Marshal A (d20+126=144 vs AC 16, 1d8+124=125 slashing, FATALITY HP -98, body destroyed). Marshal B fled toward the lord's tower. Sergeant + courier stood off, neither engaging. Shen continued walking south. Civilization first-contact clock fired HOSTILE-version. Cult of Anku clock 5 → 25 (next ward-bearer dispatched ETA Day 8). Vorathiel pursuit clock 6 (her notice deadline was Day 1 evening). +200 combat XP. 1 of 2 normal-encounters required for boss eligibility.
_chapter_history.rolls: Initiative — Shen 24 (DEX 0 + dragon DEX 0 wait DEX is base 10 mod 0 + something? — actual roll d20+12 was wrong; corrected: DEX is now mod 0 so initiative is d20+0). Marshal attacks vs AC 135: polearm A 18 MISS, polearm B 10 MISS, crossbow 13 MISS. Shen claw on Marshal A: d20+126 = 144 vs AC 16 HIT, 1d8(1)+124 = 125 slashing, FATALITY (HP -98 ≤ -10).

_narrative_summary: Shen Sama is the firstborn of Vorathiel, the Dragon God Queen, and Kenji, the Dragon Emperor — the egg from Kenji's pregnancy with Vorathiel after the Iron Crown War. Hatched and raised on the Dragonspine peaks under his mother's strict territorial law, Shen is the first Ankuspawn True Dragon ever recorded. Aging is unusually fast for a true dragon: at 24 years old he is the size and form of a fully-developed adult, with the dragon-bonus stat scaling that comes with that age. His Ember focuses on body amplification, damage reflection via green dragon-fire, and the ability to transform into an adult black dragon when the ground gives him room.

Chapter 1 — Stand Down. Day 1: 24th birthday, Shen took a single black scale from his mother's nest, pocketed it, stepped off the natal ledge while she was on her morning hunt. Twelve hours of granite descent, two days of lower passes. Day 3 morning: walked past a Highford waystation without speaking; the keeper held fire and signaled the lantern-courier line. Day 3 mid-afternoon: a four-rider patrol intercepted on the south road. All three of their attacks missed clean (AC 135). Sergeant ordered stand-down and offered a courteous-report exit. Shen broke the truce — single claw strike on Marshal A, FATALITY (HP -98, body destroyed beyond resurrection). Marshal B fled toward the tower. Sergeant + courier stood off, traumatized, did not engage. Shen kept walking south.

Status going into Chapter 2: Day 3 mid-afternoon, ~28 miles south of Dragonspine peaks on Highford's south road. Civilization first-contact clock fired HOSTILE permanently — every settlement south has his description by Day 4 evening. Cult of Anku patron clock 25%, first Ember-Shade ward-bearer dispatched from Stormhaven ETA Day 8. Vorathiel pursuit clock 6%, accelerating. Lord Highford petitioning Council for Mage-Hunter writ tonight. CHA 4 / Persuasion DC 18 to enter any town stands as the social engine. Shen does not yet know Cookie exists; she's currently in Varenholm. Three travel paths open: continue road-south, off-road through the pines, or Dragon Form flight.

main_cast_extension._note: Cross-campaign family ties — these NPCs exist in other campaigns and Shen has known-but-distant relationships with them.

relationship.last_event: She raised him under strict draconic law for 24 years. Possessive, demanding, isolating. He left without telling her — she'll discover by sundown Day 1. She loves him. She is also a Dragon God who does not want him loose in the kingdom.

Kenji has never met Shen — Vorathiel kept the egg-child secret. Kenji's pregnancy tracker likely registered Shen's birth at the time but he was not informed. Currently retired alone at the Hearthstead in Greymere Valley.
Shen has never met Ignis. He knows only the rumors — fame, songs about her, kingdom-scale reputation. She is the model he's chasing.
Shen does not know Cookie exists. Cookie is currently in Varenholm, just earned Bard School Prodigy. If Shen reaches the Adventurer's Guild there, the half-siblings cross paths in a major story beat.

persistent_effects._rule: Track all status effects, auras, poisons, and debuffs that persist across scenes. Update every chapter. See dm_rules_tracking.md § Poison, Status Effects & Debuff System.

on_pc_from_npcs.type: aura | poison | curse | disease | debuff | buff
